entity.summary: Community-owned decentralized exchange on HyperEVM providing token swaps, optimized routing, liquidity pools, concentrated-liquidity positions, private trading features, rewards, and wallet-connected trading.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation identify HX / HyperExchange as a decentralized exchange built for HyperEVM and Hyperliquid, with optimized swaps, liquidity pools, concentrated liquidity, LP fee earning, points, and private-trading features.

evidence.title: HX official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies HyperExchange as an exchange for HyperEVM and exposes live trading entry points, optimized routing, liquidity pools, concentrated liquidity, and rewards features.

evidence.title: HX Documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies hx.finance as a community-owned DEX built on Hyperliquid and documents swaps, private trading, liquidity provision, yield farming, points, fees, and smart-contract resources.

evidence.title: HX trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party JavaScript trading application endpoint remains reachable as the live HX exchange interface.
